description: §38.9 clean neg — the identical channel with a static `name="counter"` literal fires NO E-CHANNEL-* diagnostic. The one-token delta (adding the required `name`) that silences E-CHANNEL-001.
rationale: §38.3: a `<channel>` carrying its required static `name` literal is well-formed on the naming contract — E-CHANNEL-001 (and the whole E-CHANNEL-* placement/naming family) stays silent.
